title: plagiobothrys micranthus
intro: Plagiobothrys micranthus, also known as small-flowered popcorn flower, is a perennial herb in the borage family native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys micranthus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
